extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won after his own team Alpecin-Deceuninck split the race on the Moeren coastal straight, reducing the bunch to 17-18 riders then attacking to form a final four-man group.
tactical_patterns: PHILIPSEN burned matches splitting the bunch on Moeren straight rather than saving legs, distancing EWAN and others intentionally.
FRISON Frederik bridged to leading quartet pushing monster gear, demonstrating domestiques can finish top-5 in wind-split classics.
Soudal-QuickStep with BALLERINI protecting JAKOBSEN inadvertently dropped their own sprinters GROENEWEGEN and DÉMARE through hard chasing pace.
KOOIJ Olav made final selection despite Jumbo-Visma having no wind-splitting initiative, showing pure engine beats tactical positioning.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: willing to work early on Moeren to create selection rather than sit, suggests confidence in form over fresh legs
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: distanced when Alpecin accelerated on Moeren straight before final laps, indicating vulnerability to sustained high-tempo headwind riding
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: climbed off early during Moeren accelerations, major form concern for flat windy races
rider_signals.FRISON Frederik: positive: bridged to four-man selection with major gear effort, rare domestique engine in wind
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: did significant work in leading 17-rider group but dropped before finale, suggests poor form management
rider_signals.LAMPERT Yves: positive: podium from leading group that Soudal-QuickStep established, validates aggressive early positioning in wind
rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: positive: second place and made final four selection without team support, pure engine overcame tactical isolation
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: dropped by teammate BALLERINI's chasing pace, suggests not in top form despite team numbers
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: dropped by Soudal-QuickStep's defensive pace work, vulnerable to sustained medium-high watts in wind
rider_signals.MOZZATO Luca: negative: crashed nasty with one lap to go, chased back but never regained front position
rider_signals.WELTEN Bram: negative: punctured and lost contact with leading group in critical wind selection phase
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: neutral: protected by BALLERINI in 17-rider group but never positioned for finale after wind split
